ogTitle: Lake Cargelligo vs Lake Conjola: Climate Safety

heading: Lake Cargelligo vs Lake Conjola — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Cargelligo, New South Wales and Lake Conjola, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Conjola has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Lake Cargelligo (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Cargelligo or Lake Conjola safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Cargelligo has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Lake Conjola scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Cargelligo scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Conjola scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Cargelligo or Lake Conjola?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Conjola has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
